title: Christmas Land
description: Adds a Christmas themed Biome to your world, along with new tools, ore, mobs and more
body:
Welcome to Christmas land!

This mod is semi dependant on the new Christmas Land Extras mod. It adds new foods and the ability to grow several crops. It will function without the "Extras" mod, but I recomend you use both.

This Mod adds many new features including:

New Christmas themed Biome!

New Mobs!

New Boss!

New Structures!

Several new themed building block sets: Make your own gingerbread themed village!

New Armor

New tool Sets

New Ore

New crop

New Foods

This mod is created to be a non-religious style Christmas theme with gingerbread and candy canes as the main theme. Everything is designed to fit in rather seamlessly with your vanilla experience. Includes both early and late game gear as well as a large boss structure. Find the biome, make new gear, make your own gingerbread house! Beware the gingerbread men, they are quite cranky at having had one of their legs and arms eaten but are still very very fast. Lurking in his high tower, away from the festivities lies in wait your final opponent. 

There is an Advancement that will give you the new recipes.

This mod is part of a series of holiday themed mods which I am working on. Upcoming mods include:

St. Patricks day: Pot of Gold - Released! Check my other mods to see this mod

Easter: Easter Eggs - Released! Check my other mods to see this mod

Holloween - Released!  Check my other mods to see this mod

Valentines Day - future developement planned

And more! Eventually these will all be compiled into a single modpack for your enjoyment.

ISSUES:

Please leve a note if you find a bug. I work a full time job and a father of two so I will respond or try to fix when I have time.


<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

This mod adds a new biome which is chrsitmas themed. It can only be found in colder parts of the world.

Within this biome, several small structures will generate more commonly and one large castle will generate, but is more rare. 

The best armor in this mod is the Steadfast Tin Soilder Armor and to aquire it, you must defeat Mr. Grinch. Each time he will drop a Steadfast heart which is useed to upgrade your Tin Armor.

Tin can be found underground, only in the Chrsitmas Biome.

Also scattered around the land are underground greenhouses, which hold a small ginger crop. Useful if you want to create more ginger bread items.

</details>





MOD PACK DEV'S

This mod does not alter vanilla blocks, recipes or other features and is safe to use with other mods. You may use this so long as proper credit is given.
